meaning: n.中客车,小型公共汽车(我国俗称面包车,乘员10人左右)
examples: The schoolboy was knocked down by a minibus when crossing the street.
He was then taken by minibus to the military base.
Security forces at a impromptu checkpoint marked by a small minibus wave us by.
He felt a sudden loss of control before the minibus collided with another vehicle and overturned.
The two boarded the minibus in the Copacabana beach district in Rio de Janeiro early Saturday.
